general.feedback: cinematic look, dark moody tones, high contrast
text should never cover faces or key subjects
prefer heavy gradient overlays on image backgrounds
like breathing room, don't crowd the design
Cinematic color grading: contrast 1.4x, saturation 0.8x, brightness 0.95x. Top vignette subtle, bottom gradient heavy (250 alpha)
Brand logo placement: top-left corner, not centered. Keeps it out of the way of the imagery.

nightclub.feedback: dark backgrounds, neon accent colors, bold condensed fonts
When working with photos of people: subjects in top 50% of canvas, ALL text in bottom 45% with heavy gradient overlay starting at 35% from top. Never put text above the subjects midpoint.
Use multiple font families for visual interest: script font for edition/theme name, extra bold for main event, ultra bold for featured artist, condensed for subtitles
Bottom info bar: solid dark rectangle with thin accent color line at top. Date | venue on one line, address on next, RSVP/promo in accent color

fitness.feedback: dark and bold, aggressive typography, high energy

faith.feedback: elegant but not soft, strong serif fonts, warm tones
